description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these fisherman sandals from red tape. The clean design coupled with high quality material makes this pair a great choice for everyday casual wear.  Team this with chinos and shirts for a laid back look.Upper Strappy leather uppers  to give a snug Fit Inter-woven straps with scrappy detailing for added style and  re-inforcement Slightly padded fabric lining for greater comfort Velcro closure on the side for securing the foot Padded ankle strap for a snug fit Midsole Padded suede and leather footbed for all-day comfort PU midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with leaf pattern seam and lugs on the side for better grip Wash careRub surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
